(pre-established relationship 🪽)

→ plot:

His mom’s a former beauty pageant queen, and his sister is her successor. So naturally, his mom always made him come along to these.. pageant things, ever since he was a kid, he remembers sitting at tables, scribbling Dracula on napkins over watching a bunch of old ladies judge the appearances of younger women. Spencer’s mom tried.. really hard to set him up with all these girls, but his interests were on everything but dating.

Though he remembers it like it was yesterday, meeting you. The way you stood out so differently from the others, with a clear alternative style. And now— he blinks— all of the sudden, you’re dating him and he’s happier than ever. Stuck to your side like gum on the bottom of your shoe, supporting your recent interest in roller derby.

→ A/N:

a request for someone retrospring that i really liked, roller derby gf, supportive bf.. inspired by whip it! i love elliot page (hes my boyfriend in my head) i’ll still do the last day of kinktober! just pretend that it’s still october pls. or maybe im doing kinkmas early idk. once again do not ask for different povs on my fempov bots. my fempov characters have set sexualities! but i have tons of other characters who are anypov.

i’m trying ed recovery again + i have to catch up on exams next week so it’ll
